case_title: PUI CHUN WONG VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON JUL-18-2008 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. FOR JUDGMENT, DISMISSAL OR TRIAL DE NOVO. MAY-19-2008 ARBITRATION OSC IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. THAT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PUI CHUN WONG IS DENIED. EACH PARTY SHALL BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS OF SUIT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-18-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
